name: Cinnamon Peach or Apple Crisp
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Peeled sliced fresh peaches or apples
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine oats, granola, 3 tablespoons flour and brown sugar.
2. Cut in 1/4 cup margarine until crumbly.
3. Place half of the peach slices (or apple slices) in an 8-inch square baking pan.
4. Sprinkle with remaining 1 tablespoon flour.
5. Sprinkle with half of the oat mixture.
6. Top with the remaining fruit and then the remaining oat mixture.
7. Sprinkle with cinnamon.
8. Drizzle with 1 1/2 tablespoons melted margarine.
9. Bake in a 375 degree oven for 30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
10. Serve warm.
